arts.sum: Liverpool travel to PSV Eindhoven this evening in their final fixture of the Champions League’s league phase. Arne Slot returns to the Netherlands with Liverpool’s progress assured. The Reds have a perfect record of seven wins from seven games and sit top of the Champions League standings.
